description: Remember, your worth isn’t defined by others. Embrace your journey and surround yourself with those who genuinely support you!
title: If You Don't Do What They Want, You're Seen as Bad

body.raw:
<Contents>

In life, we often find ourselves surrounded by people who have expectations of us. When we fail to meet these expectations, it can lead to misunderstandings and negative perceptions. Sometimes, we become labeled as "bad" or ungrateful in the eyes of those who wish to mold us into what they want us to be.

However, it’s essential to remember that our true worth isn't defined by others' opinions. While it's important to maintain positive relationships and strive to be good to those around us, we must also prioritize our own growth and well-being.

Surround yourself with individuals who uplift you, encourage your dreams, and respect your journey. Keep doing good for others, but don’t let their expectations break your spirit or dictate your path. Authenticity and self-care are not selfish; they are vital to thriving in a world full of differing expectations.

Stay true to yourself, and remember that your happiness and progress matter just as much. 💪✨

</Contents>
